doc_title: Break the Sequential Dependency of LLM Inference Using LOOKAHEAD DECODING

items.evidence_span: As they are increasingly integrated into diverse applications such as search (Team et al., 2023)
based on (Touvron et al., 2023a;b; Jiang et al., 2023; OpenAI, 2023) autoregressive decoding
based on (Touvron et al., 2023a;b; Jiang et al., 2023; OpenAI, 2023) autoregressive decoding
based on (Touvron et al., 2023a;b; Jiang et al., 2023; OpenAI, 2023) autoregressive decoding
based on (Touvron et al., 2023a;b; Jiang et al., 2023; OpenAI, 2023) autoregressive decoding
Speculative decoding (Chen et al., 2023; Leviathan et al., 2023)
Speculative decoding (Chen et al., 2023; Leviathan et al., 2023)
Specinfer (Miao et al., 2023) uses many draft models obtained from distillation, quantization, and pruning to conduct speculations together.
Medusa (Cai et al., 2024), OSD (Liu et al., 2023), and EAGLE (Li et al., 2023) use training to obtain a draft model.
Medusa (Cai et al., 2024), OSD (Liu et al., 2023), and EAGLE (Li et al., 2023) use training to obtain a draft model.
Medusa (Cai et al., 2024), OSD (Liu et al., 2023), and EAGLE (Li et al., 2023) use training to obtain a draft model.
REST (He et al., 2023) uses the finetuning dataset itself as a datastore to lookup speculations
other works (Yang et al., 2023; Saxena, 2023) uses prompt as a reference for speculations
other works (Yang et al., 2023; Saxena, 2023) uses prompt as a reference for speculations
compatible with memory-efficient attention algorithms (e.g., FlashAttention (Dao, 2023))
